title: CXXRTL edge detector not working for non-input clocks

features.name: internally generated clock divider via always_ff toggle
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that generates an internal divided clock by toggling a logic signal on each posedge of the primary clock, creating a non-port clock source

features.name: sequential logic triggered on internally derived clock
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that uses a non-port, internally-computed logic signal as its clock (posedge sensitivity), rather than a primary input clock

features.name: multi-clock design with primary input and internally derived clock domains
features.description: Code should include two always_ff blocks in the same module where one block drives a logic signal used as the clock of the second block, creating chained clock domains with no direct port clock for the second domain
